about.hero_subtitle: We're not just a booking platform. We're your digital gateway to the stratosphere of luxury exploration, powered by the most sophisticated AI on the planet.

mission.title: Our Purpose
mission.p1: In an era of endless options, the true luxury is relevance. SmartTravel was founded on the belief that travel shouldn't be about scrolling through generic listings—it should be about discovering experiences that resonate with your soul.
mission.p2: Our proprietary AI engines process millions of data points, from real-time climate patterns to local cultural festivals, ensuring that every itinerary we generate is as unique as a fingerprint. We bridge the gap between human intuition and machine precision.
mission.p3: Whether you're seeking a silent retreat in the Andes or a high-energy culinary tour through Tokyo, our Digital Concierge understands the nuance of your desires before you even voice them.

team.title: The Team
team.heading: The Architects of Journey
team.subtitle: Meet the visionaries blending aerospace engineering with hospitality to redefine your transit.

du.desc: Passionate about creating seamless experiences with every click. Designs interfaces with the motto: Beautiful, intuitive, and bug-free.

dat.desc: Guiding the team through endless deadlines. Spends most of his time teaching AI to understand human nuances better than code.

duy.desc: The wizard behind the curtain, managing the entire backend architecture to ensure the app always runs lightning fast.

hien.desc: Addicted to CSS and smooth animations. The one responsible for turning wild design ideas into living, breathing UI.

hung.desc: Loves solving complex logic puzzles. Transforms messy raw data into clean, stable, and efficient APIs.

anh.desc: In love with numbers and charts. Discovers hidden patterns in massive datasets to recommend your perfect trip.

hieu.desc: The orchestrator of the team, perfectly balancing the developer's wildest ideas with actual project requirements.

nguyen.desc: The team's bug hunter, living by the rule that it's better to break things locally than let a single bug reach the user.

cta.heading: Ready to transcend the ordinary?
cta.subtitle: Our concierge is standing by to build your next stratosphere journey. Reach out to our global support team or start your exploration today.

header.label: Global Discovery
header.desc: Explore our curated selection of breathtaking landscapes, cultural hubs, and hidden gems designed for the weightless voyage.

mock_result.title: Your Curated Journey

aiconcierge.greeting: Hello! I am your AI Concierge. I can help you plan your next trip, find information, or just have a chat. How can I assist you today?
aiconcierge.user_msg_1: Suggest a 3-day itinerary in Da Lat this November. I want quiet places with beautiful architecture.
aiconcierge.bot_msg_1: Da Lat in November is wonderful with pink grass and wild sunflowers, and the air is perfectly chilly. Here's a "Slow & Artsy" itinerary for you:
aiconcierge.bento_1_desc: Explore **Bao Dai Palace III** and the French colonial villas on Tran Hung Dao street. In the afternoon, visit **Ana Mandara Villas** for tea.
aiconcierge.bento_2_desc: Morning visit to **Stop and Go Art Space**. Afternoon relaxation at hidden alley cafes like **Tung Coffee** or **Thong Oi**.
aiconcierge.bot_msg_2: I understand! That's a great idea. Would you like me to go into more detail for each location?
